_readme: Each entry is one searchable article. 'category' should match the app's channel-style tags (General / Priority / Danger-Alert / Information) where relevant. Content here needs review by someone with real legal background before it ships — see CONTRIBUTING.md. Every entry needs a real 'source' citation, not just prose.
